purpose: Phase 11 Freshness / Update Monitor Engine for Matrix Reprogrammed. This data defines which systems need recurring review, which files they depend on, and what a clean update means.
rules: Do not pretend static pages are live counters.
Every update lane must list its source data and output pages.
A stale page should route to the Trust Center or Evidence Vault rather than overclaiming.
Fast-moving lanes need clearer date labels than evergreen book pages.
Every update should preserve claim labels and evidence boundaries.

lanes.title: Intel Desk Freshness Lane
lanes.cadence: Weekly or when major public-record changes occur
lanes.summary: Tracks bulletins, archive updates, news routes, and current signal pages without pretending the site has real-time news automation.

lanes.title: Evidence Vault Freshness Lane
lanes.cadence: Monthly or when new source lanes are added
lanes.summary: Tracks source hierarchy, source cards, claim rules, source boundary language, and source-card links.

lanes.title: Power Atlas Freshness Lane
lanes.cadence: Monthly or when new nodes/relationships are added
lanes.summary: Tracks nodes, evidence classes, relationship types, and no-guilt association boundaries.
checks: Source boundary exists on every node

lanes.title: Book Universe Freshness Lane
lanes.cadence: When books are added, renamed, unpublished, or repriced
lanes.summary: Tracks live book pages, reader routes, generated book pages, and Amazon/store routing.
checks: Unpublished books do not generate sales routes

lanes.title: AI Answer Freshness Lane
lanes.cadence: Monthly or when answer topics change
lanes.summary: Tracks structured answer pages, FAQ schema, evidence boundaries, and AI-search summaries.
checks: Routes connect to evidence and books

lanes.title: Funnels / Trust Freshness Lane
lanes.summary: Tracks forms, thank-you pages, privacy routes, Trust Center, corrections policy, and conversion claims.

lanes.title: Distribution / Sales Freshness Lane
lanes.cadence: Monthly or when marketing paths change
lanes.summary: Tracks content distribution formats, reader paths, sales ladder, and conversion routes.
checks: Sales ladder does not promise income
Distribution routes return to source pages
